scripts.start: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run seed --prefix backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix backend
scripts.dev: cross-env STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_xxx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --workspaces && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: cross-env STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_xx npm run test --prefix backend
